hooks.prompt: Read .agent-memory/session-summary.md and .agent-memory/identity/soul.md silently. Apply the identity settings. Only report to the user if there are warnings (declining quality scores, unresolved critical patterns). Keep the briefing under 10 lines.

Check if meaningful work was done this session. If yes: update .agent-memory/session-summary.md with completed work, open items, and next steps (max 30 lines). If coding iterations were completed but not logged, log them to iteration-log.md. If nothing meaningful was done, skip silently.
